evals.prompt: Create a PR with title='Add responsive view buttons to component preview' and description about testing on different viewport sizes
evals.expected_output: PR successfully created with feature branch, pushed to GitHub, and PR URL returned

evals.prompt: Open a PR titled 'Fix API timeout issue' with custom description 'Increases timeout from 5 seconds to 15 seconds for slow networks'
evals.expected_output: PR created with fix/ branch prefix, proper commit message, and description in PR body

evals.prompt: Generate a PR without providing description - just title 'Update documentation'
evals.expected_output: PR created with auto-generated description based on git diff and commit history
